content: By 2025, self-supervised world model memory agents can repurpose the surprise-driven active sampling dynamics of 2024-2025 SOTA curiosity-driven active memory agents to prune and prioritize their growing episodic memory banks, rather than only using world models to generate synthetic training data. This creates a recursive cycle where the agent’s own world model predictions drive the selection of which episodic memories to retain, aligning memory storage with long-term planning utility instead of raw recency or frequency.
